buildCommand: export NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=4096'; timeout -k 30s 900s pnpm build || { code=$?; if [ "$code" = 124 ] || [ "$code" = 137 ]; then echo "Build failed with exit $code (timeout/OOM); a clean-cache retry cannot fix this - not retrying"; exit "$code"; fi; echo "Build failed with exit $code; retrying once with a clean .next"; rm -rf .next; timeout -k 30s 900s pnpm build; }
